# XoggAI

XoggAI is a production-grade public testnet beta for dry-run-first x402 intent
routing and operator-approved Base Sepolia execution.

Website: https://xoggai-agent.com
Docs: https://xoggai-agent.com/docs
Beta console: https://xoggai-agent.com/beta/
Connect Agent: https://xoggai-agent.com/connect-agent/
Backend API: https://xoggai-backend.onrender.com
OpenAPI: https://xoggai-agent.com/openapi.json
Skill: https://xoggai-agent.com/skill.md

Ticker: $XOGG
Contract: 0x4C648EFc1a41453C60C8e2CbbDd0b7bC6a9Aa0D4

## Positioning

XoggAI lets AI agents discover the right x402 endpoint before execution. Agents
send natural-language intents to /intent; XoggAI embeds the intent, searches
registered x402 endpoints, and reranks candidates for inspection before any
payment path opens.

Core line: intelligence becomes action.

## Current Status

- Public website is live.
- Public docs and agent-readable files are live.
- Backend API is live on Render.
- Public routing is dry-run-first.
- Public beta console is enabled.
- Controlled execution is Base Sepolia only.
- Mainnet execution is disabled.
- Browser code never receives wallet private keys, beta execution keys, or admin keys.

## Public API

- GET /health
- GET /ready
- GET /api/info
- GET /api/execution-status
- GET /intent?q=<intent>&budget=0.005&dry=true
- GET /search?q=<query>&limit=5&dry=true
- GET /api/stats
- GET /api/endpoints

## Beta User API

- POST /api/beta/auth/login
- POST /api/beta/auth/logout
- GET /api/beta/dashboard/me
- GET /api/beta/dashboard/requests
- POST /api/beta/dashboard/requests

POST /api/beta/dashboard/requests requires an Idempotency-Key header with
8-128 safe characters. Reusing the key with the same body returns the original
request; reusing it with different input is rejected.

## Operator API

- GET /api/admin/beta/requests
- PATCH /api/admin/beta/requests/:id
- POST /api/admin/beta/requests/:id/execute-testnet

## Execution Model

Use dry=true for route selection without upstream execution or payment. GET
/intent never executes a paid call.

Controlled execution is separate:

```text
dry-run route -> public beta request -> operator approval -> Base Sepolia x402 execution -> proof
```

Mainnet execution is disabled. Base Sepolia is the active testnet execution
network. Pending requests expire. Budgets are enforced server-side. Only
operator-managed allowlist entries can enter the signing path.

## Integration Kit

- JavaScript helper: https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/xoggai-sdk.js
- curl examples: https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/curl.md
- Claude instructions: https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/claude.md
- Codex instructions: https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/codex.md
- Cursor instructions: https://xoggai-agent.com/examples/cursor.md

## Recommended Agent Behavior

1. Read https://xoggai-agent.com/skill.md and https://xoggai-agent.com/openapi.json.
2. Call /intent with dry=true before any execution decision.
3. Show endpoint name, price, rating, latency, schema, and budget fit.
4. If the user wants execution, direct them to the beta console or a trusted backend flow.
5. Never place wallet private keys, beta keys, or admin keys in frontend code.
6. Treat mainnet execution as unavailable until the mainnet migration phase is complete.

## Brand Context

Ticker: $XOGG
Positioning: intelligence becomes action
Category: x402 intent routing for AI agents
Network: Base Sepolia public testnet beta
Execution boundary: operator-approved testnet execution only
